sections.heading: New
items: Text Stencil: new text stencil support.
Drop Finder files onto the timeline: Easier way to drag files from your computer directly onto the timeline.
Agent new tool: Agent can now capture frames from your timeline.

sections.heading: Improved
items: Claude Desktop MCP server: We released mcpb 2.0 where it eliminates the need to reinstall the MCP server to Claude Desktop on every update. You do need to re-install one more time to update to 2.0.
Rendering: Better audio meter rendering to improve performance.
